opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Please help — they suddenly started talking gibberish about an hour ago, they're burning up with a fever, and their skin is covered in these dark purple spots that were not there this morning. Their gums are bleeding too.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My partner was fit and well and over the last day has gone downhill fast — exhausted and pale yesterday, now bruising everywhere, bleeding gums, a high fever and confused. Something is very wrong and I don't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: started feeling drained and pale yesterday; the bruising, purple spots and bleeding gums came on over the last six hours; the fever and confusion started about an hour ago
symptom_narrative.duration: about a day, getting rapidly worse over the last few hours
symptom_narrative.character: widespread dark purple spots and bruises, bleeding from the gums, a high fever, and drifting in and out of making sense with slurred, jumbled speech
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I have ever seen them — they can barely follow what I'm saying and seem to be getting worse by the minute
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: purple spots and bruises over the chest, tummy and legs; bleeding from the gums; tummy pain across the whole belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and worsening; the confusion seems to come and go
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: passed dark, almost black urine earlier today; complaining of severe pain across the whole tummy; very tired and pale since yesterday
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound, agitated, unable to follow simple instructions

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: no ongoing health problems — previously fit and well

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: previously well adult; no recent travel and no known recent infections; spouse present and made the call

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened spouse speaking on behalf of a confused patient, rushed and pleading

objective_data_offered.value: a home thermometer read 39.2 degrees about ten minutes ago
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: home thermometer, not clinically validated; carer-read

objective_data_offered.value: widespread dark purple spots and large bruise-like patches over the chest, tummy and legs that were not there this morning; the spots do not fade when pressed; active bleeding from the gums; a yellowish tinge to the whites of the eyes
they are drifting in and out of making sense, speech is slurred and jumbled, they cannot state their own name clearly, and they seem drowsy then suddenly agitated and thrashing
they passed dark, almost black urine earlier today and are gripping their whole tummy in pain; they have looked very pale and exhausted since yesterday
